themes.headline: PMS & AIF AUM jumped 8x YoY: ₹3,368 cr → ₹28,657 cr
themes.detail: ESIC mandate ramp-up drove the bulk; debt AUM in ESIC mandate alone ₹24,260 cr.

themes.headline: SIP AUM ~45% of total AUM — stickiness signal
themes.detail: SIP contribution ₹1,140 cr in June '25 across 38L accounts. Moved to contribution model.

themes.headline: First close of ABSL Structured Opportunities Credit Fund Series 2 (private credit)
themes.detail: ABSL India Equity Innovation Fund in pipeline.

themes.headline: Vantage Point regional growth summits with MFDs covering ~80% of AUM markets
themes.detail: Deepening engagement with top distribution partners.

themes.headline: Some large customers withdrew fees as part of portfolio restructuring

events.label: First close — ABSL Structured Opportunities Credit Fund Series 2

quotes.text: SIP AUM contributes around 45% of our total AUM, representing stickiness of the assets.
quotes.speaker: A. Balasubramanian, MD & CEO
